creator: raivo@lehma.com
text: 0.8 is not an update, it's a two and a half years old release and all the components it uses are also way older than the more or less current situation on GitHub. Maybe the author could be convinced to cut a new release, but going back two and a half years does not seem reasonable. I am keeping my original port (with Patrick's modifications, bin -> libexec) for now.
